```prompt
---
agent: refactorkit.fix
---

Fix diagnosed code quality issues based on a prior diagnosis from refactorkit.diagnose — lint errors, import cleanup, deprecation migration, code smell refactoring, test warning resolution, coverage hardening, and test leakage fixes.

Use keywords to run selective fix: "lint", "import", "deprecation", "smell", "warning", "coverage", "leakage", or "full" for all.

```
